errorText: SWAYA couldn't load your settings right now. Make sure the backend is running and try again.

mode.title: How SWAYA Organizes Files
mode.hint: Choose how you want SWAYA to handle your files.
mode.libraryHint: SWAYA renames files and moves them into a clean movie and TV library.
mode.inplaceHint: SWAYA only cleans up file names and keeps everything where it already is.
mode.warningHint: If you don't set a target folder, SWAYA will organize files inside the source folder. That can create duplicate folders and may confuse torrent clients.

advanced.title: Matching Rules
advanced.minVideoSizeMbHint: Files smaller than this are treated like extras instead of main movies or episodes.
advanced.minVideoDurationMinutesHint: Files shorter than this won't be treated like main movies or episodes.

advancedLanguage.title: Language for Names and Info
advancedLanguage.metadataFollowsUi: Use the app language for titles and descriptions
advancedLanguage.metadataFollowsUiHint: SWAYA will try to fetch movie and episode info in the same language as the app.
advancedLanguage.metadataLanguage: Preferred language for titles and descriptions
advancedLanguage.metadataLanguageHint: Pick the language SWAYA should try first when it looks up movie or episode info.
advancedLanguage.fallbackMetadataLanguage: Backup language for titles and descriptions
advancedLanguage.fallbackMetadataLanguageHint: Use this if the first language isn't available.
advancedLanguage.targetFollowsUi: Use the app language for renamed files and folders
advancedLanguage.targetFollowsUiHint: SWAYA will use the same language as the app when it renames files and folders.
advancedLanguage.targetLanguage: Language for renamed files and folders
advancedLanguage.targetLanguageHint: Pick the language you want to see in the final file and folder names.

theme.title: Theme
theme.label: App Theme
theme.hint: Choose how the app should look.

closeBehavior.title: When You Close the App
closeBehavior.label: Close Action
closeBehavior.hint: Choose what SWAYA should do when you close the main window.

language.title: Language
language.hint: English is available now. More languages will be added over time.

adult.title: Adult Content
adult.includeAdultHint: SWAYA will include adult and NSFW titles when searching and matching. Enabling this adds a flame toggle button to the Windows title bar to quickly switch between SFW and NSFW modes.
adult.adultGenderPreferenceHint: Specify which gender you prefer to manage for adult content (All, Female, Male).

stashdb.title: StashDB Integration
stashdb.apiKeyHint: Enter your StashDB (stashdb.org) API key for fetching adult performer metadata.
stashdb.endpointHint: The GraphQL API URL for StashDB.

fansdb.title: FansDB Integration
fansdb.apiKeyHint: Enter your FansDB (fansdb.cc) API key for indie performers and OnlyFans metadata.
fansdb.endpointHint: The GraphQL API URL for FansDB.

theporndb.title: ThePornDB Integration
theporndb.endpointHint: The GraphQL API URL for ThePornDB.

folders.title: Folders
folders.scanFolderPlaceholder: Where SWAYA should look for files
folders.targetFolderPlaceholder: Where SWAYA should build your library

organization.title: Organization Style
organization.presetHint: Pick the layout style you want SWAYA to use for your library.
organization.customToggleHint: Turn this on if you want to fine-tune folder layouts and naming rules yourself. It also unlocks extra organization options in the left sidebar.

presets.plexDesc: A clean library layout with separate folders and subtitles grouped under Extras/.
presets.jellyfinDesc: A Jellyfin-friendly layout that keeps subtitles and other extra files next to the main video.
presets.kodiDesc: A Kodi-friendly layout with dot-separated file names and extras stored next to the video.
presets.minimalDesc: A simple layout with very little nesting and fewer extra folders.

organization.previewHint: See how your folders and file names will look with the current setup.

fileNaming.title: File Names
fileNaming.casingHint: Choose how letter casing should look in renamed files.
fileNaming.separatorHint: Choose how words should be separated in file names.
fileNaming.movieTemplateHint: Set the naming pattern for movie files. You can use tags like {title}, {year}, {resolution}, {edition}, and {custom}.
fileNaming.episodeTemplateHint: Set the naming pattern for episode files. You can use tags like {tv_title}, {season}, {episode}, {episode_title}, {resolution}, and {custom}.
fileNaming.customTagHint: This text will be used anywhere you place the {custom} tag.
fileNaming.videoExtsHint: List the video file extensions SWAYA should treat as video files, separated by commas.

scenes.minVideoSizeMbHint: Smaller video files are treated as extras. The 1 MB default keeps short social and OnlyFans clips.
scenes.minVideoDurationMinutesHint: Shorter videos are treated as extras for StashDB and ThePornDB scene scans. The 1 minute default filters out most sample and promo clips before matching.
scenes.fansdbMinVideoDurationMinutesHint: FansDB scene scans can use a tighter cutoff. The 0.14 minute default starts filtering clips under about 8 seconds into extras sooner.
scenes.filenameTemplateHint: Choose which scene metadata appears in renamed filenames.
scenes.dateFormatHint: Formats the {date} value. Use the separate {year} variable when only the year is needed.
scenes.preventTitlePerformer: Remove repeated performer names from the beginning of titles
scenes.preventTitlePerformerHint: Avoid names such as 'Lana Rose - Lana Rose Late Night Audition'.
scenes.groupingModeHint: Build studio folders inside the Adult Scenes folder before applying the optional scene folder pattern.
scenes.folderTemplateHint: Optional final folder below the selected studio hierarchy. Leave blank to store scene files directly in the group folder.
scenes.tagLimitHint: Use 0 to omit tags. Positive values set the maximum number of tags in the filename.
scenes.tagSeparatorHint: Choose what appears between tags in the {tags} template value.
scenes.tagBlacklistHint: Comma-separated exact tag names that should never appear in filenames.
scenes.performerLimitHint: If a scene has more performers, omit them unless the keep option is enabled.
scenes.keepPerformersAtLimit: Keep only the first performers up to the limit
scenes.performerSortHint: Popularity uses each performer's PornDB rating.
scenes.squeezeStudioNamesHint: For example, 'Velvet Studios' becomes 'VelvetStudios' in filenames and grouping folders.

folderStructure.orgEnabledHint: If this is off, SWAYA only renames files and won't sort them into folders.
folderStructure.moveToLibrary: Move Organized Files to the Target Folder
folderStructure.moveToLibraryHint: If this is on, SWAYA moves files into your target folder. If it's off, SWAYA organizes them inside the scan folder.
folderStructure.sortByTypeHint: SWAYA will split movies, shows, and adult content into their own top-level folders.
folderStructure.organizeAdultByType: Separate adult movies, TV shows, and scenes
folderStructure.organizeAdultByTypeHint: Create separate content-type folders inside the Adult folder.
folderStructure.removeEmptyHint: SWAYA will clean up empty folders after it moves files.
folderStructure.createMovieSubdirHint: Give each movie its own folder.
folderStructure.createShowDirHint: Give each TV show its own folder.
folderStructure.createEpisodeDirHint: Give each episode its own folder. This is usually only helpful if you keep extras with each episode.

rules.title: When a File Already Exists
rules.durationTolerance: Allowed Length Difference for 'Replace If It Looks Better' (seconds)

collections.title: Collections
collections.createCollectionDirHint: SWAYA will group related movies into collection folders, like a trilogy or franchise.
collections.collectionModeHint: Choose when SWAYA should group movies into collection folders.

collectionModeOptions.threshold: Only if you own at least X movies from the collection
collectionModeOptions.complete_only: Only if every movie in the collection is matched

collections.collectionThresholdHint: SWAYA will only create a collection folder if you have at least this many movies from it.

extras.title: Extras
extras.extrasEnabledHint: SWAYA will also organize subtitles, trailers, images, and other extra files.
extras.folderModeHint: Choose whether extras go into their own folder or stay next to the video file.
extras.inplaceInfo: With in-place renaming, subtitles and other extras stay next to the main media file.

folderModeOptions.subfolder: In a separate folder (for example Extras/)

extras.mediaSideFilesTitle: Files That Usually Sit Beside the Video
extras.extraVideoAction: What to Do with Extra Videos
extras.audioAction: What to Do with Audio Files
extras.metadataAction: What to Do with Info Files

api.tmdbStepsTitle: How to Get a TMDB Key
api.tmdbStep1Start: Create an account or sign in at
api.tmdbStep2Start: Open your account settings and choose
api.tmdbStep4Mid: into the first field, and the long
api.omdbStepsTitle: How to Get an OMDb Key
api.omdbStep2End: plan (1,000 requests per day), or pick a donor option.
api.omdbStep3: Enter your email address. OMDb will send your key by email.
api.omdbStep4End: Open the activation link in the email, then paste the key into the OMDb field above.

backup.title: Backup and Restore
backup.description: Save your current settings to a file, or bring back a backup you exported earlier.
backup.importSuccess: Your settings were loaded. Review them, then click Save Changes to apply them.
backup.importError: Couldn't import that file. Make sure it's a valid settings backup.

liveImpact.title: Live Impact
liveImpact.fileNamingHint: See how your naming choices change the final movie and episode file names.
liveImpact.folderStructureHint: See how your folder choices change the final library layout.
liveImpact.extrasHint: See how your extras settings change where extra files end up.

validation.backendUnavailable: SWAYA couldn't check your folders right now.
validation.vlcNotFile: The VLC path needs to point to a file.
validation.mpcNotFile: The MPC-HC path needs to point to a file.
validation.scanDirNotFolder: The scan path needs to point to a folder.
validation.scanDirNotReadable: SWAYA can't read that scan folder.
validation.libraryDirNotFolder: The target path needs to point to a folder.
validation.libraryDirNotWritable: SWAYA can't write to that target folder.
validation.foldersCannotBeSame: The scan folder and target folder can't be the same.
validation.adultValidationFailedEndpointApiKey: {{provider}} validation failed. Check the endpoint and API key.
validation.adultValidationTimedOut: {{provider}} validation timed out. Check your connection and try again.
validation.adultValidationFailedEndpoint: {{provider}} validation failed. Check the endpoint and try again.
validation.Default Scan Folder must point to a fold: The scan path needs to point to a folder.
SWAYA can't read that scan folder.
validation.Target Library Folder must point to a fo: The target path needs to point to a folder.
SWAYA can't write to that target folder.
validation.Default Scan Folder and Target Library F: The scan folder and target folder can't be the same.

dangerZone.title: Database Reset
dangerZone.desc: This clears your libraries, matches, custom lists, and playback history. Your settings and API keys stay in place. This can't be undone.
dangerZone.confirm: Are you sure? This will clear your libraries, matches, lists, and playback history. Your settings and API cache will stay. This can't be undone.

languageChangeInfo.title: Language Synchronization
languageChangeInfo.description: SWAYA will download the new language data if it is not already available. The larger the library, the longer this process will take.
